title: QAT OLE
description: Quantum Advantage Tracker Operator Loschmidt Echo (OLE) benchmark. Loads an OLE circuit and estimates the Pauli-Z product expectation value ⟨Z_{q_0} ... Z_{q_k}⟩. A value close to 1.0 indicates low decoherence. The benchmark score equals the reported OLE observable value.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'QAT OLE' for this schema.

circuit.description: Named QAT OLE circuit to fetch from the Quantum Advantage Tracker repository. Mutually exclusive with qasm_path. Uses the known observable qubits [52, 59, 72] for all named circuits.

qasm_path.description: Path to a local OpenQASM 3.0 circuit file. Mutually exclusive with circuit. Requires observable_qubits to be set explicitly.

observable_qubits.description: Qubit indices to measure for the Pauli-Z product observable. Required when using qasm_path. Defaults to [52, 59, 72] for named QAT circuits.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit execution.
